title: Soulection Radio Show #398 (Noodles Radio)
content:
Kehlani's DJ and Bay Area native, [Noodles](https://soundcloud.com/wicvh), takes over the show.


<!--more-->

Find Noodles on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/wicvh), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/bbnoodz), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/noodz/)
